title: Excellent ANC
text: Noise cancelling is excellent on flights and the sound is balanced.

title: Great for work
text: Bluetooth connection is stable and battery lasts all week.

title: Budget winner
text: Very affordable headphones with surprisingly good ANC for the price.

title: Big bass
text: The speaker is waterproof and loud enough for outdoor parties.

title: Workout earbuds
text: Earbuds stay secure while running and gym workouts.
